meta.title: Granit Mitoyen - Stoner metal band from Rennes, France
meta.description: Official website of Granit Mitoyen, a stoner metal band from Rennes, Brittany (France). Shows, Kill Birgahn album, videos and contact.

hero.title: Granit Mitoyen
hero.subtitle: Stoner metal band from Rennes, France

about.title: A wall of stoner sound
about.text: Granit Mitoyen is a stoner metal band from Rennes. Heavy riffs, dark atmospheres and psychedelic journeys tell the story of Kill Birgahn, a dark fantasy universe in seven chapters.

albumHighlight.title: Kill Birgahn, a 7‑chapter concept album
albumHighlight.text: Each track of Kill Birgahn explores a key moment of the story, from Asel’s call to the awakening of the Heavy Wolf.

showsHighlight.title: On stage
showsHighlight.text: Catch Granit Mitoyen live in venues and festivals across Rennes and Brittany.
